description: select a preferred solution from a Pareto front via pseudo-weights MCDM (read-only)
rules: read-only — selects from an obtained Pareto front and writes a report; mutates nothing remote or live
runs the vendored decision_making_example.py core (NSGA-II on ZDT1 + PseudoWeights MCDM) via python3
forces MPLBACKEND=Agg so the Scatter and Petal plots never block
captures stdout (extreme solutions, per-preference selections) to record_store/decision_making.txt
requires the pymoo package at run time; degrades to an empty {} report if it is absent
usage: Set PROBLEM (e.g. zdt1), POP_SIZE, N_GEN. Output: decision_making.txt.
limitation: The vendored core runs its built-in ZDT1 optimization and compares three fixed preference-weight scenarios; vars document intent. Needs the pymoo library installed to produce real results.
